title: CTA Banner

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: section_heading
fields.instructions: Large H2 heading. Example: "Let's work together"

fields.label: Description
fields.name: section_description
fields.instructions: Short supporting line beneath the heading. 1 sentence.
fields.default_value: Ready to get started? Get in touch for a quote or consultation.
fields.placeholder: Ready to get started? Get in touch for a quote or consultation.

fields.label: Primary CTA
fields.name: cta_primary
fields.instructions: Coral button — main call to action. Example: "Book a strategy session"

fields.label: Secondary CTA
fields.name: cta_secondary
fields.instructions: White button with coral text. Optional. Example: "Send us a brief"

description: Fields for the CTA Banner block.
